description_long: This bonsai features a dense canopy of broad, angular leaves with a mottled pattern of olive green and white, giving it a striking, variegated appearance. The trunk is relatively slender and rises from a rectangular, black planter that is set within a larger, square base. The base incorporates wooden slats on three sides, suggesting integrated bench seating or decorative edging, and is framed by a glossy black border. The leaves are arranged in a layered, overlapping fashion, creating a lush and full silhouette. The overall design is modern and geometric, with the planter and base providing a strong contrast to the organic form of the tree. This object would be well-suited for display in urban parks, plazas, or contemporary outdoor spaces.
description: A lush, variegated-leaf bonsai in a modern black rectangular planter with integrated wooden bench seating and a glossy black base. The dense foliage and geometric base make it ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bonsai's dense foliage, the rectangular black planter, and two visible wooden bench sections on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angled canopy and the full length of one wooden bench section, with the planter and base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bonsai, the planter, and the third wooden bench section, with the foliage appearing slightly more layered.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bonsai's canopy from another angle, with the wooden bench section and glossy black base prominent.
attribute_pot_type: Rectangular, black, likely plastic or metal planter with a glossy finish, set within a square base featuring integrated wooden bench sections and a black border.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is gently curved, rising upright with a slight natural bend, resembling an informal upright bonsai style.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are densely arranged in a layered, overlapping pattern, radiating outward to form a full, rounded canopy.
attribute_leaf_density: Dense, with foliage covering most of the visible branches and creating a lush, full appearance throughout the canopy.
